positive: A central, whimsical illustration of a group of highly stylized, glowing fireflies forming an abstract, circular constellation pattern. The fireflies emit vibrant emerald and sapphire blue bioluminescence against a deep, velvety indigo twilight sky. The style is graphic, minimalist, and highly contrasted, resembling negative space woodcut etching with a pop art flair. Composition is symmetrical and centered, featuring clean, defined silhouettes and strong light sources. Focus on smooth gradients and sharp edges suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blur, noise, grain, text, watermark, signature, logo, low contrast, dull colors, poor anatomy, extra limbs, messy, photorealistic, jpeg artifacts
